x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Security playbooks are the automated response procedures that Now Assist SIR recommends based on AI incident classification. Without playbooks, AI can identify incident type but cannot suggest structured response actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure security playbooks for each major incident category. Navigate to Security Operations > Playbooks to create and activate playbooks for phishing, malware, data breach, insider threat, and DDoS scenarios.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_dff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Security playbooks are the automated response procedures that Now Assist SIR recommends based on AI incident classification. Without playbooks, AI can identify incident type but cannot suggest structured response actions.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Security Playbook Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sys_pd_process_definition");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sys_pd_process_definition not found", finding: "Process Automation Designer table is not available. Verify the Security Incident Response plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sys_pd_process_definition");
    ga.addQuery("sys_scope.scope", "sn_si");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (count >= 5) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " active security playbooks configured", finding: count + " active security playbooks. Now Assist SIR can recommend AI-matched playbooks based on incident type and threat category." };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " active security playbooks configured", finding: "Only " + count + " active security playbook(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist SIR playbook recommendations will have limited coverage across incident types." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "No active security playbooks found", finding: "No active security playbooks configured. Now Assist SIR cannot recommend playbooks without defined response procedures." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SECOPS</module><number>CHK0000532</number><order>600</order><remediation_guidance>Configure security playbooks for each major incident category. Navigate to Security Operations > Playbooks to create and activate playbooks for phishing, malware, data breach, insider threat, and DDoS scenarios.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>dff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Security Playbook Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_dff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
